chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 7021 of 2022 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge(s) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.29615/2023. 2. For hearing of main case. 23.01.2025 Mr. Zia Ahmed, advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of the petitioner, which is taken on record. Petition is pending since 2022. Even notice has not been served till date. The crux of the arguments articulated is that the petitioner seeks refund from the Income Tax department. Be that as it may, the Income Tax department is not arrayed as respondent herein and even otherwise in presence of adequate remedy available, direct recourse in writ jurisdiction is unwarranted. Petition is found to be misconceived, hence, dismissed in limine. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
